title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
